name: ZevBot
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl bash && rustup toolchain install nightly && rustup component add rustfmt clippy --toolchain nightly && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.local/bin && export PATH="/home/vscode/.local/bin:$PATH" && curl -fsSL 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zevlion/rpm/refs/heads/master/scripts/linux-installer.sh?'$(date +%s) | sed 's|/usr/local/bin|/home/vscode/.local/bin|g' | bash && rm -f /workspaces/zevBot/rpm.db /tmp/rpm_*.sock /tmp/rpm.sock
